creator: christos@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to imbutler from comment #24)
I am aware that there are some Dell models with this issue too.

However in your syslog it doesn't say anything about SOF. If you're using the i1915 driver, you could try adding the following to /boot/loader.conf to get HDMI sound:

compat.linuxkpi.i915_disable_power_well="0"
